common.title: Umufasha wa AI w'u Rwanda
common.welcome: Murakaza neza ku Mufasha wa AI w'u Rwanda
common.description: Bonera ubufasha mu bwishingizi, ubukerarugendo, ubuhinzi, n'ubucuruzi mu Rwanda

chat.welcome_message: Muraho! Nshobora kubafasha mu giciro cy'ubwishingizi, gutegura urugendo, inama z'ubuhinzi, n'iyandikisha ry'ubucuruzi mu Rwanda.
chat.example_insurance: Gerageza: 'Mpa igiciro cy'ubwishingizi bw'imodoka Toyota i Kigali'
chat.example_tourism: Gerageza: 'Ntegure urugendo rw'umunsi umwe hafi ya Musanze n'amafaranga 50k RWF'
chat.example_farming: Gerageza: 'Nhinga ibigori muri Nyamagabe; nkore iki ukwezi?'
chat.example_business: Gerageza: 'Nandikisha nte ubucuruzi bw'umuntu ku giti cye?'
